title: Select and use agricultural technology
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Select and use agricultural technology demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Evaluate need for agricultural technology

pcs.text: Identify and evaluate organisational tasks and processes that could be supported by technological applications

pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and evaluate organisational tasks and processes that could be supported by technological applications.
